title: PortForwarded
description: Securely expose your Server instance to the internet without tweaking your router.
body: # PortForwarded ![Modrinth Shield](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/WNiQAmtw?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C) ![Github Shield](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source_code-Available-src?style=for-the-badge&color=00AF5C&logo=github&label=Source%20code&link=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FRelism%2FPortForwarded) For more information, visit [PortForwarded's official site](https://portforwarded.relism.dev). By using PortForwarded, you agree to the [Terms of Service](https://portforwarded.relism.dev/tos). **PortForwarded** is a _server-side_ mod/plugin that allows you to securely expose your Minecraft server to the internet **without opening your router's ports**. With **PortForwarded** you can easily and securely **share your server with friends and players around the world** without the hassle of configuring port forwarding on your router. **Note:** Your players don't need to install the mod themselves! ## Installation To install **PortForwarded** follow these steps 1. Download the mod/plugin and place it in the 'mods/plugins' folder of your Minecraft server. 2. Restart your server to load the mod. 3. After the restart, a `config.yml` file will be generated in `/mods:plugins/PortForwarded/config.yml`. ## Configuration Only one configuration field is present for now: ```yaml legacyFallback: true ``` - If set to `true`, `legacyFallback` will attempt forwarding using a third-party tunneling service called **Serveo**. - This is a **last-resort option** to maximize service availability. > Make sure to save the changes to `config.yml` after updating the fields. ## Usage Once you have **PortForwarded** installed and configured, start your Minecraft server as usual. The mod will automatically handle the tunneling for all set ports and securely expose your server to the internet. The domain will appear in the console, and it can be safely shared with your friends and players to connect to your Minecraft server. ## Support and Troubleshooting For any further assistance or troubleshooting, please reach out to our [support server](https://discord.gg/hTxKa3JxMU) on Discord.
